# CDRView component extraction (2026-03-10 11:26Z)

_**User**_

Extract `CDRView` from `d:\web development\test\src\pages\SuperAdmin.jsx` into a new file `d:\web development\test\src\pages\superadmin\CDRView.jsx`.

Steps:
1. Read SuperAdmin.jsx from line 4295 to line 4463 to get the full `CDRView` function
2. Create the new file with:
   - Import `{ memo }` from 'react'
   - Import `{ API_BASE }` from '../utils/api' (if used in the component)
   - The full component body (keep the memo wrapper)
   - `export default CDRView;` at the bottom
3. The CDRView takes many props. Make sure the function signature is preserved exactly.

Do NOT modify SuperAdmin.jsx yet — just create the new file.
